title: dactylorhiza incarnata var. drudei
intro: Dactylorhiza incarnata var. drudei, also known as the bloody orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique red or reddish-purple flowers and tuberous roots. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza incarnata var. drudei include its ability to stimulate the heart and improve circulation, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and improving overall cardiovascular health. Dactylorhiza incarnata var. drudei can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried roots, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas and other remedies.
